mapper.select: SELECT u.USER_ID AS userId, u.USER_NAME AS userName, u.ROLE_ID AS roleId, u.PASSWD AS passwd, u.USER_STATE_CODE AS userStateCode FROM FWK_USER u WHERE u.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT u.USER_ID AS userId, u.USER_NAME AS userName, u.ROLE_ID AS roleId, u.POSITION_NAME AS positionName, u.ADDRESS AS address, u.CLASS_NAME AS className, u.EMAIL AS email, u.USER_STATE_CODE AS userStateCode, u.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, u.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, u.ACCESS_IP AS accessIp, u.USER_SSN AS userSsn, u.PHONE AS phone, u.REG_REQ_USER_NAME AS regReqUserName, u.TITLE_NAME AS titleName, u.EMP_NO AS empNo, u.BRANCH_NO AS branchNo, u.BIZ_AUTH_CODE AS bizAuthCode FROM FWK_USER u WHERE u.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_SSN FROM FWK_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_USER ( USER_ID, USER_NAME, PASSWORD, PASSWD, ROLE_ID, POSITION_NAME, ADDRESS, CLASS_NAME, EMAIL, USER_STATE_CODE, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID, ACCESS_IP, USER_SSN, PHONE, REG_REQ_USER_NAME, TITLE_NAME, EMP_NO, BRANCH_NO, BIZ_AUTH_CODE ) VALUES ( #{dto.userId}, #{dto.userName}, #{dto.password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{encodedPassword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.roleId}, #{dto.positionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.className, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.userStateCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId}, #{dto.accessIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.userSsn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.regReqUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.titleName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.empNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.branchNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bizAuthCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_USER WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_USER WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
SELECT LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT FROM FWK_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.sql: FROM FWK_USER u LEFT JOIN FWK_ROLE r ON u.ROLE_ID = r.ROLE_ID

u.USER_ID AS userId, u.USER_NAME AS userName, u.EMAIL AS email, u.ROLE_ID AS roleId, r.ROLE_NAME AS roleName, u.CLASS_NAME AS className, u.POSITION_NAME AS positionName, u.USER_STATE_CODE AS userStateCode, u.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, u.LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT AS loginFailCount
mapper.select:
SELECT u.USER_ID AS userId, u.USER_NAME AS userName, u.EMAIL AS email, u.PHONE AS phone, u.ADDRESS AS address, u.USER_SSN AS userSsn, u.ROLE_ID AS roleId, r.ROLE_NAME AS roleName, u.CLASS_NAME AS className, u.POSITION_NAME AS positionName, u.USER_STATE_CODE AS userStateCode, u.ACCESS_IP AS accessIp, u.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, u.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId
WHERE u.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT u.USER_ID AS userId, u.USER_NAME AS userName FROM FWK_USER u WHERE u.USER_STATE_CODE = '1' AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM FWK_USER_MENU um WHERE um.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND um.MENU_ID = 'v3_cms_admin_approvals' AND um.AUTH_CODE = 'W' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM FWK_ROLE_MENU rm WHERE rm.ROLE_ID = u.ROLE_ID AND rm.MENU_ID = 'v3_cms_admin_approvals' AND rm.AUTH_CODE = 'W' ) ) ORDER BY u.USER_NAME ASC, u.USER_ID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT u.USER_ID AS userId, u.USER_NAME AS userName FROM FWK_USER u WHERE u.USER_STATE_CODE = '1' AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM FWK_USER_MENU um WHERE um.USER_ID = u.USER_ID AND um.MENU_ID = 'v3_react_cms_admin_approvals' AND um.AUTH_CODE = 'W' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM FWK_ROLE_MENU rm WHERE rm.ROLE_ID = u.ROLE_ID AND rm.MENU_ID = 'v3_react_cms_admin_approvals' AND rm.AUTH_CODE = 'W' ) ) ORDER BY u.USER_NAME ASC, u.USER_ID ASC

SELECT
ORDER BY
UPPER(u.USER_ID) UPPER(u.USER_NAME) UPPER(u.CLASS_NAME) UPPER(r.ROLE_NAME) UPPER(u.POSITION_NAME) u.USER_STATE_CODE u.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME u.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME
ASC DESC DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT USER_ID AS userId, USER_NAME AS userName FROM FWK_USER WHERE (USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY USER_ID ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 20
